# Dossier — Configuration

Per-user settings read by the `dossier` skill.

---

## Notion Tracker (Optional)

```yaml
# --- Notion Mirror (optional) ---
notion:
  enabled: true
  data_source_id: ""
  parent_page_url: ""
  tracker_url: ""
  sync_compensation: false
```

---

```yaml
# default_search_location: "Remote"
```
